title: ASR Outdoor 22pc Backpack Kit, Beach Combing Metal Detector Accessories Set

ASR Outdoor 22pc Backpack Kit, Beach Combing Metal Detector Accessories Set

This ASR Outdoor Deluxe Beach Digger Metal Detector Kit is comprehensive set of metal detecting accessories and hand tools for beginners and seasoned treasure hunters alike. This kit includes a multi-purpose, collapsible silicone bucket, a sand scoop and sand digger, as well as a 30L backpack, so you can tote all your equipment and tools with you for beach days, camping trips, family excursions and much more.

Key Features

  • METAL DETECTOR SAND KIT: Get ready to find treasure and gold at the beach or lake shore with the ASR Outdoor Deluxe Beach Digger Metal Detector Kit; this metal detector and accessories kit has everything you need for treasure recovery and storage, making it an accessible and comprehensive assortment of sand scoop tools for beginners or seasoned beach combers alike
  • METAL DETECTOR ACCESSORIES: 30L canvas backpack, 1/70 classifier screen, sand scoop, large sand scoop, 16lbs pick up tool, pen separator, four plastic pipettes, two magnifier tweezers, green steel sand digger, six glass vials, two small plastic snifter bottle and collapsible silicone bucket with handle; 22 total pieces
  • PERFECT FOR TREASURE HUNTING: Take this metal detector kit to your local beach, lake shore or riverbed to find lost gems and precious metals; three different sand scoops or trowels, a handy collapsible silicone bucket and durable plastic classifier screen
  • 30 LITER CANVASS BACKPACK: All kit components conveniently fit into the large 30 liter backpack, featuring a top load opening cover and a draw string closure to keep everything secure. (3) large side compartments with a zipper closure to hold smaller items. This backpack can also be used for everything from backpacking and trekking, to hunting, camping, school and much more
  • TOP GEAR EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this beach digging kit is made from quality material; from the high impact, durable plastic classifier screen and sand scoops, to the metal magnifying tweezers, green steel digger shovel and sturdy backpack; all the components will see you through many seasons to come

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRBDKIT22PC
  • UPC: 810058486196
  • Color: Green
  • Size: Large

The beach digger kit includes 22 pieces to help you in your recovery efforts of hidden treasure below the surface:

- x1 30L 100% cotton backpack - x1 collapsible silicone bucket - x1 1/70" Mesh Classifier Sifting Pan - x1 orange sand scoop/shovel/trowel - x1 16lbs pick up tool - x1 pen separator - x4 plastic pipettes - x2 magnifier tweezers - x1 green steel sand digger - x6 glass vials - x2 plastic snifter bottle - x1 large black sand scooper
